title: Create reusable EC2 EBS Zephyr builder cache volume
description: Build a single-AZ EBS volume prepopulated with Zephyr build dependencies, toolchains/caches, and project workspace support so future EC2 Zephyr builds can attach it instead of reinstalling from scratch. Document the volume ID, AZ, mount path, and AWS/SSH console workflow in AGENTS.md so agents know to use it.
acceptance_criteria: Create and validate an EBS volume in one AZ with Zephyr builder dependencies/cache content; verify it can be attached and mounted on EC2; update AGENTS.md with exact usage details including volume ID/AZ/mount path and boot observation via SSH/AWS API; close the Bead when complete.
close_reason: Created EBS Zephyr builder cache volume vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 in us-east-2a, populated Zephyr SDK 0.16.8 and v3.7.0 west workspace, validated native_sim link_crypto build/run, documented usage in AGENTS.md and Beads memory.
